title: Magically Charred Mediterranean Lamb Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic one-pot dish featuring charred lamb, fresh mint, and Mediterranean spices, cooked to perfection in a claypot. This recipe is gluten-free friendly and perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to high heat.
In a large claypot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the lamb pieces to the claypot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion to the claypot and cook until it starts to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic to the claypot and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Stir in the chopped fresh mint, dried oregano, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Cover the claypot and transfer it to the preheated broiler, cooking for 10 minutes, or until the lamb is charred and cooked through.
Remove the claypot from the broiler and let it cool slightly before serving.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with additional fresh mint if desired.
